tape: Equities firm and calm -- S&P +0.39%, Nasdaq +0.67%, Dow +0.17%, VIX ~16.0 (-3%) on a soft June PPI following Tuesday's cool CPI, plus ASML's bullish AI-capex signal; quant_regime calm_drift agrees with my read of the tape, no sector shock breaking, energy/geopolitics remains the isolated tail rather than a broad risk-off.

alerts.headline: Broad tape firm/calm: S&P +0.39%, Nasdaq +0.67%, Dow +0.17%, VIX ~16.0 (-3%) on soft June PPI + cool CPI + ASML AI-capex read. Bank earnings (MS/BLK/JNJ) benign; UAL after the close. No sector shock; quant_regime calm_drift concurs with my read.

HELD ~$2.31 -- news flow constructive but already scored: 7/6 ATF ruling classifies BolaWrap 150 as an instrument of restraint (removes procurement barrier) and 7/10 Frenel Imaging deal secures US/NATO rights to TPiCore. risk.json notes the Frenel item is a $2M securities-purchase agreement (minor dilution) -- so business-positive but NOT boost-eligible. Stale-cache phantom-sell path gated by fix a5484b6. FinBERT +0.019. Do-not-ADD ($200M baby-shelf capacity). No boost.

HELD/best gainer ~$14.62 -- no fresh 7/15 catalyst; the +13% move on 7/14 ICONIQ/director $14.4M buys is already priced. FY27 guide raised to $879-883M (24-25% YoY) but FCF negative (-$57.2M FQ1). Post-lockup distribution overhang persists (Form 144 1.75M Class A 7/8 + Lightspeed sales). FinBERT +0.158. No boost.

HELD ~$13.58 -- no fresh company item; Bhappu $968k (7/7) + Hansen $51k (7/8) buys already scored. risk.json insider signal net-NEGATIVE by size (Chalmers Form 144 ~800k sh > ~$1M buys); $300M ATM confirmed UNDRAWN; VAC ~$1.9B rare-earth acquisition + $725M OSC loan are 2027 items. Lorentzian -0.75, FinBERT 0.0. No boost.

HELD, clean ~$17.19 -- no fresh 7/15 item. Caris Detect launch + analyst Buy initiation (early July), $100M buyback, no shelf/ATM. Evercore trimmed PT to $25 from $30 (7/2) but stays Buy above price. FinBERT +0.144. No boost.

HELD, low risk ~$5.58 -- Q1 FY27 (7/7) $107.9M rev / $0.15 non-GAAP / $26.9M adj EBITDA; director Englander bought 76,190 sh @ $5.22 (7/13). Anti-dilutive $140M self-tender, no shelf/ATM. Stop $4.94. No boost.

TOP-3 CANDIDATE (4.75, below 5.25 line) -- no NEW July offering, ~30% standing dilution: $50M registered direct (27.6M sh @ $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26. Stock ~$1.70 BELOW the $1.81 offer; CEO buys came AFTER the raise. Concur risk.json -- do not buy as insider breakout.
TOP-3 CANDIDATE (4.6, below line) -- textbook pump-and-dump: HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), now ~$3.49, no fundamental driver. Reject on pump veto. Concur risk.json.

TOP-3 CANDIDATE (3.7, below line) -- 12-for-1 reverse split effective 7/14 (new CUSIP G8071C137) purely for Nasdaq $1 compliance on an unfunded AI/blockchain/crypto pivot; the +0.919 FinBERT is a misattributed generic-market headline. Reverse-split cache desync noted. Concur risk.json -- keep vetoed.

WATCHLIST ~$6.44 (+11.6% on the week) -- DLA bridge modification extended the refrigerant contract to 11/29/26 (options to 5/29/27); Hartree Partners keeps buying (5,234 sh, $31k, 7/6-7/7). Constructive but already known/scored; Q1 was a miss (EPS $0.01 vs $0.11, rev $60.2M). No fresh boost.

~$2.31, near-doubled off ~$1.06 (6/25) front-running the ATF ruling + Frenel/WrapShield news flow; no new contract award.
